title: supera-engineer receipt
description: The structured verdict the supera-engineer agent emits as its final message. Consumed by /start and /pr-watch, which branch on `status` deterministically instead of scraping prose.

implemented.description: One-line summary of what was implemented.

files.description: Files touched, each with a short note on what changed and why.

path.description: Repo-relative path of the changed file.

note.description: What changed and why, or the coverage added.

verification.description: Result of each self-verify check run from CONFIG.verify. Omit a check that has no command in config.

committed.description: The resulting commit sha on the feature branch, or null for the /refactor leave-uncommitted case.

decisions.description: Non-obvious choices or assumptions a reviewer should know.

outOfScope.description: Flagged pre-existing failures, deferred work, or follow-ups. Empty when none.

status.description: Machine-readable verdict the orchestrator reads first. 'ok' = in-scope, verified green, complete. 'needs-review' = proceeded but a flagged fork/assumption needs a human glance, or a check could not be run. 'blocked' = hard blocker; work is incomplete.

output.description: Key tail of the command output (e.g. 'N passed').
